---
title: Ecological report
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Ecological report}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  \usepackage[utf8]{inputenc}
---

# Ecological report

This tutorial shows how to generate a full ecological report with `camtrapReport`.

## Input data

Create the `camReport` object from a Camtrap-DP `.zip` file:
